allow: Bash(node -e "const v=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\); const versions=JSON.parse\(v\); const v5=versions.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''''5.''''\)\); console.log\(''''v5 versions:'''', v5.slice\(-10\)\); const v6=versions.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''''6.''''\)\); console.log\(''''v6 versions:'''', v6.slice\(-5\)\);")
